caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Barbados Today
caribbean.paragraph: Barbados is experiencing moderate easterly winds at 19 kt with wave heights reaching 5.4 ft and a dominant swell direction from the ESE. Rain probability is high at 82%, creating wet conditions, while St. Lucia sees lighter winds near 13 kt and less intense marine impacts.

mediterranean.headline: Moderate Winds and Showers Affect Mykonos Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing moderate northwesterly winds sustained at 21 knots with wave heights reaching 4.7 feet and a swell period of 6 seconds. There is a 26% rain probability, while Haifa reports lighter winds at 11 knots and less than 10% rain probability.
